validated_commands.ci_test: mix ecto.create --quiet && mix ecto.migrate --quiet && mix test
validated_commands.note: mix not available in CI runner; tests reviewed for correctness and validated by CI on merge

testing_notes.framework: ExUnit with DataCase (async: true for DB tests via Sandbox), Factory via ex_machina
testing_notes.async_pattern: async: true with DataCase is common; async: false only for shared global state
testing_notes.factory: KlassHero.Factory with build/insert_pair/etc; factory files in test/support/factories/
testing_notes.event_tests: Participation domain event tests use pure struct construction, no DB needed
testing_notes.coverage_tool: excoveralls (mix coveralls.html); CI does not block on coverage thresholds
testing_notes.mix_unavailable: mix binary not in PATH in CI runner; must verify test correctness by reading implementation

testing_backlog.description: admin provider_live.ex on_item_updated/2 publishes provider_verified/provider_unverified integration events; existing tests verify DB state only
E2E scale tests for messaging PubSub fan-out (Issue #515); needs real PubSub infra and maintainer decisions on CI budget/approach

completed_work.description: 2 new DataCase tests for CorrectAttendance: status-only cond branch and empty-string append_to_field branch
11 new async unit tests extending participation_events_payload_test.exs covering 7 previously untested factory functions
